summary: Extends BGP to carry Autonomous System numbers as four-octet entities, defining how two-octet ASNs map into the four-octet space (high-order octets zero) and reserving the special two-octet value AS_TRANS (23456) to represent non-mappable four-octet ASNs toward legacy speakers. Defines the AS4_PATH/AS4_AGGREGATOR attributes for transition. Obsoletes RFC 4893 and updates RFC 4271; the authoritative reference for 4-byte ASN classification.
title: BGP Support for Four-Octet Autonomous System (AS) Number Space
